query:
INSERT IGNORE INTO kc_library (kc_id, name, domain, jurisdiction, category, authority_type, authority_cite, authority_notes, tags) VALUES
('CRIM_CA_MURDER_187', 'Murder', 'criminal', 'CA', 'Violent', 'statute', 'Cal. Penal Code § 187', 'Degree/mental state specifics vary.', 'violent,homicide'),
('CRIM_CA_ROBBERY_211', 'Robbery', 'criminal', 'CA', 'Violent / Property', 'statute', 'Cal. Penal Code § 211', 'Force/fear + taking from person/immediate presence.', 'violent,property'),
('CRIM_CA_ASSAULT_DW_245', 'Assault with Deadly Weapon / Force Likely to Produce Great Bodily Injury', 'criminal', 'CA', 'Violent', 'statute', 'Cal. Penal Code § 245', 'Variant subsections exist.', 'violent,weapon'),
('CRIM_CA_DV_273_5', 'Corporal Injury to Spouse/Cohabitant (DV)', 'criminal', 'CA', 'Domestic Violence', 'statute', 'Cal. Penal Code § 273.5', 'Relationship element critical.', 'dv,violent'),
('CRIM_CA_BURGLARY_459', 'Burglary', 'criminal', 'CA', 'Property', 'statute', 'Cal. Penal Code § 459', 'Entry + intent at time of entry.', 'property'),
('CRIM_CA_THEFT_484', 'Theft (general definition)', 'criminal', 'CA', 'Property', 'statute', 'Cal. Penal Code § 484(a)', 'Charging level depends on value/type.', 'property,theft'),
('CRIM_CA_FORGERY_470', 'Forgery', 'criminal', 'CA', 'White Collar', 'statute', 'Cal. Penal Code § 470', 'Subsections vary by instrument.', 'fraud,white-collar'),
('CRIM_CA_ID_THEFT_530_5', 'Identity Theft', 'criminal', 'CA', 'White Collar / Cyber', 'statute', 'Cal. Penal Code § 530.5', 'Possession/use of personal identifying info.', 'identity-theft,fraud'),
('CRIM_CA_DRUG_POSSESSION_11350', 'Controlled Substance Possession (common starter)', 'criminal', 'CA', 'Controlled Substances', 'statute', 'Cal. Health & Safety Code § 11350', 'Substance/schedule specifics vary.', 'drugs'),
('CRIM_CA_DUI_23152', 'DUI', 'criminal', 'CA', 'DUI / Traffic', 'statute', 'Cal. Vehicle Code § 23152', 'Alcohol/drug subdivisions exist.', 'dui,traffic');
